template_data.sub: Nearly every first call hits the same wall. But teaming agreements exist for exactly this moment.
template_data.image_headline: THE PAST PERFORMANCE WALL HAS A DOOR
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Dark navy background with forest green and amber accent colors (William theme), Sora typeface. Bold headline top: 'THE PAST PERFORMANCE WALL HAS A DOOR'. Left side: illustrated professional man in business casual wearing a headset, warm confident expression. Right side: simple two-path flowchart with arrows — Path 1 red X short label 'NO HISTORY' hitting a solid wall, Path 2 green arrow short label 'TEAMING' going around the wall through a door icon short label 'FEDERAL AWARD'. Callout box: 'FIND A PRIME. BRING THE WORK.' Clean professional illustration style. Footer text: 'William Hill · GSA Focus'.
